author: Brandon Bachmeier
name: Better Media v2
description: Touch-friendly media widget v2. Vanilla JS rebuild from the 7.5 fallback baseline. Adds back the album-art blur background + Behavior settings (Polling Interval, Show synced lyrics, Lyric sync offset, Auto-expand toggle/delay) one bisect step at a time to track down the periodic flicker that plagued the earlier full-feature builds. Aspect-ratio responsive layout, smooth transform-based lyric scroll, full-width transport with Connect/Playlists slot.
